SEARCH
Package simulator.model

Class SystemProcess

java.lang.Object
simulator.model.Process
simulator.model.SystemProcess
public class SystemProcess extends Process
Represents the system process (the simulator's VIP). Its main role is to execute system calls (I/O) requested by user processes. Unlike normal processes, it has absolute priority and is automatically activated at periodic intervals.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class simulator.model.Process

    currentState, id, lastProcessorId, requiredMemory

    Constructors

    SystemProcess(int id, int releasePeriod)
    Constructs the system process.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    checkReleaseTime()
    Checks if the timer has expired and the system process needs to be awakened.
    void
    executeTick(int currentTime)
    Executes one time unit (tick) for the process at the head of the I/O queue.
    UserProcess
    getCurrentlyProcessingIo()
    Returns the process currently at the counter (being processed for I/O) at this moment.
    UserProcess
    getFinishedIoProcess()
    Returns the process that just finished its I/O to be reintroduced by the SimulationEngine into the scheduler's Ready Queue.
    void
    requestSystemCall(UserProcess process)
    Adds a user process to the waiting queue for system calls.

    Methods inherited from class simulator.model.Process

    getCurrentState, getId, getLastProcessorId, getRequiredMemory, setLastProcessorId, setState

  • Constructor Details

    • SystemProcess

      public SystemProcess(int id, int releasePeriod)
      Constructs the system process.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique identifier (usually 0).
      releasePeriod - The activation period of the process.

  • Method Details

    • requestSystemCall

      public void requestSystemCall(UserProcess process)
      Adds a user process to the waiting queue for system calls. Uses a circular buffer queue implementation.
      Parameters:
      process - The user process that blocked for I/O.

    • checkReleaseTime

      public boolean checkReleaseTime()
      Checks if the timer has expired and the system process needs to be awakened.
      Returns:
      true if it must be launched on the processor, false otherwise.

    • getFinishedIoProcess

      public UserProcess getFinishedIoProcess()
      Returns the process that just finished its I/O to be reintroduced by the SimulationEngine into the scheduler's Ready Queue.
      Returns:
      The unblocked user process, or null if none finished.

    • executeTick

      public void executeTick(int currentTime)
      Executes one time unit (tick) for the process at the head of the I/O queue. If the queue is empty, the system process enters the waiting state (WAITING_IO).
      Specified by:
      executeTick in class Process
      Parameters:
      currentTime - The current global simulation time.

    • getCurrentlyProcessingIo

      public UserProcess getCurrentlyProcessingIo()
      Returns the process currently at the counter (being processed for I/O) at this moment.
